video.title: Deep house bassline tutorial - rolling sub

segments.text: we are going to roll off the low end of the bass around 30 hz to keep it tight
then add a little sidechain compression triggered from the kick drum
keep the sub bass in mono below 120 hz and widen the pads above it
automate the filter cutoff to open up slowly over eight bars for movement
saturate the bass gently and boost around 800 hz so it cuts on small speakers
